claim: Front-and-center Mission Studio plus Ask GoalOS chat, solved use cases, and complete route preservation.
boundary: No user data. No user funds. No wallet. No transaction. No network call. No production authority. Human review required.

useCases.title: Understand GoalOS in 10 minutes
useCases.objective: I am new and want the fastest path to understand GoalOS.
useCases.why: Learn the thesis, boundaries, proof loop, and best demos without reading the whole site.
useCases.gate: understand AI creates output; GoalOS creates proof

useCases.title: Learn the 48 Ethereum Mainnet contracts
useCases.objective: I want to understand the 48 Ethereum Mainnet contracts.
useCases.why: Turn the contract surface into a learnable proof rail instead of a raw address list.

useCases.title: Run a public-safe proof mission
useCases.objective: I want to run a public-safe proof mission.
useCases.why: Move an objective from vague AI output to a reviewable Evidence Docket plan.

useCases.title: Prepare an executive decision brief
useCases.objective: I want a decision-ready evidence package for an AI initiative before approving action.
useCases.why: Turn uncertainty into a governed decision state that can be inspected and challenged.

useCases.title: Evaluate an AI vendor or tool
useCases.objective: I want to evaluate an AI vendor or tool using evidence, not marketing claims.
useCases.why: Ask what evidence is required before trusting, buying, integrating, or recommending a tool.

useCases.title: Understand Loop to RSI governance
useCases.objective: I want to understand how long-running agent loops become deterministic RSI governance.
useCases.why: Follow the path from loop contracts to replay, bottlenecks, state capacity, and Move-37 dossier discipline.
useCases.gate: OMNI is search control, not outcome authority

useCases.title: Check privacy, token, and data boundaries
useCases.objective: I want to confirm what data, funds, wallet actions, and token claims are not accepted by GoalOS.
useCases.why: Know exactly what not to submit and what GoalOS does not do.
useCases.gate: no data, no funds, no wallet

useCases.title: Review or replay a proof claim
useCases.objective: I want to independently review a GoalOS claim and know which evidence to inspect.
useCases.why: Find the claim, docket, route health, downloads, and dissent/review path.

useCases.title: Turn accepted work into reusable capability
useCases.objective: I want to understand how verified work becomes reusable capability instead of a one-off answer.
useCases.why: See how proof becomes Chronicle memory, capability package, and a harder future mission.

useCases.title: Audit website and repository completeness
useCases.objective: I want to check whether the website is complete, navigable, current, and claim-bounded.
useCases.why: Verify route integrity, all-pages navigation, registry completeness, and public boundary coverage.

useCases.title: Plan a defensive cybersecurity proof mission
useCases.objective: I want a defensive, public-safe cybersecurity review path with no secrets, no external scans, no exploit execution, and human review.
useCases.why: Create a safe defensive mission package without offensive action or sensitive data.

useCases.title: Design a controlled pilot program
useCases.objective: I want to design a controlled pilot where every serious pilot ends with a docket.
useCases.why: Define mission, success criteria, evidence requirements, review, and follow-up status before action.
